key: [order-l8]
text: In my view, we should act now. The data suggests the market will recover next quarter. If we wait, we will lose the deal. Of course, I can back up that claim with numbers. The bottom line is: if we act now, we will lead the deal.

key: In my view, we should move now. The data suggests the market will recover next quarter. If we wait, we will lose the deal. The bottom line is clear: if we act now, we will lead.

key: I hear your case, but I want to push back. What is the downside? If the deal fails, how much will we lose? Back up your numbers before we decide.
